evals.prompt: I need to upgrade my .NET MAUI SparkScan app from Scandit SDK v6 to v7. Here is my current page code-behind: MainPageV6.xaml.cs.
evals.expected_output: The skill renames v6-era SparkScan APIs: TorchButtonVisible → TorchControlVisible, SoundModeOn → SoundEnabled, HapticModeOn → HapticEnabled. Removes ContinuousCaptureTimeout (deleted in v7). Replaces the v6 SparkScanFeedback POCO assigned to SparkScan.Feedback with the v7 ISparkScanFeedbackDelegate assigned to SparkScanView.Feedback (using SparkScanBarcodeSuccessFeedback / SparkScanBarcodeErrorFeedback). Preserves new SparkScan(settings) and the OnAppearing/OnDisappearing forwarding pattern on the MAUI control. Confirms the MauiProgram.cs UseScanditCore + UseScanditBarcode(c => c.AddSparkScanView()) chain is correct.

assertions.text: viewSettings.SoundModeOn is replaced with viewSettings.SoundEnabled (a bool)
viewSettings.HapticModeOn is replaced with viewSettings.HapticEnabled (a bool)
viewSettings.ContinuousCaptureTimeout is removed (no replacement; controlled internally)
The SparkScanFeedback POCO (with Success / Error Feedback properties) is no longer present in the updated code
A class implementing ISparkScanFeedbackDelegate is introduced (or the page itself implements it)
GetFeedbackForBarcode(Barcode) is implemented and returns SparkScanBarcodeSuccessFeedback / SparkScanBarcodeErrorFeedback
this.SparkScanView.Feedback is assigned to the delegate (or the Feedback bindable property is bound)
new SparkScan(settings) is preserved (not renamed to SparkScan.Create or anything else)
The BarcodeScanned event subscription (or ISparkScanListener implementation) is preserved
this.SparkScanView.OnAppearing() and this.SparkScanView.OnDisappearing() lifecycle calls are preserved
At least one of the v6→v7 migration guide URLs (https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/net/android/migrate-6-to-7/ or https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/net/ios/migrate-6-to-7/) is provided

evals.prompt: I'm upgrading my Scandit .NET MAUI SparkScan SDK from v7 to v8. What do I need to change in my code?
evals.expected_output: The skill explains that MAUI projects do NOT need to add explicit ScanditCaptureCore.Initialize() / ScanditBarcodeCapture.Initialize() calls — the .UseScanditCore() / .UseScanditBarcode(...) builder extensions handle initialization. The SparkScan factory pattern (new SparkScan(settings)) is unchanged. Confirms the SparkScan MAUI builder chain (.UseScanditCore().UseScanditBarcode(c => c.AddSparkScanView())) is the correct shape. Provides at least one v7→v8 migration guide URL.

assertions.text: The skill explains that the MAUI builder extensions (UseScanditCore / UseScanditBarcode) handle SDK 8.0+ initialization, so no manual ScanditCaptureCore.Initialize() / ScanditBarcodeCapture.Initialize() call is needed in MauiProgram.cs, MainApplication.cs, or AppDelegate.cs
The skill does NOT instruct the user to replace new SparkScan(settings) with anything else — the .NET SparkScan constructor is unchanged in v7→v8
The skill does NOT instruct the user to add a sparkScan AddMode/RemoveMode call (that is a cross-platform native SDK change, not .NET MAUI)
The MAUI builder chain shape is reaffirmed: .UseScanditCore() takes no configure lambda for SparkScan, and .UseScanditBarcode( takes a configure lambda invoking AddSparkScanView()
At least one of the v7→v8 migration guide URLs (https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/net/android/migrate-7-to-8/ or https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/net/ios/migrate-7-to-8/) is provided
